ratings.note: Long-term A-/Stable, short-term A2+; adjusted debt/networth 0.26x (improved from 0.90x FY23), interest coverage 4.6x, liquidity strong (~Rs800cr cash/liquid assets, current ratio 2.55x); working capital cycle intensive (~240-day GCA).

ratings.instrument: bank facilities (Rs 1,000cr fund and non-fund based)
ratings.note: Long-term downgraded to BBB+/Stable from A-/Stable; short-term downgraded to A2 from A2+. Follows FY26 revenue decline (-31.4% YoY) and sharp EBIT/PAT drop.
